chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. Application No. S- 284 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025. Mr. Ahmed Bux Abro, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Safdar Ali Ghouri, Advocate for the Respondents. Mr. Mohammad Noonari, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------------ Through instant criminal miscellaneous application, applicant seeks cancellation of Bail granted to the Respondent No.1, vide order dated 29.05.2024, passed by learned VI- Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana. 2. The factum that all the prosecution witnesses have been examined by the learned trial court is admitted by the learned Counsel for the Applicant and now the case is at the verge of conclusion. 3. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General and learned Counsel for the respective parties extended their consent for disposal of the instant application for cancellation of bail. Accordingly, it stands disposed of with the directions to learned trial court to dispose of the case within shortest spam of time and furnish such report to this Court, through Additional Registrar. Instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
